title: Argentina's YPF to Invest $400 Million in Sustainable Jet Fuel Venture
content: Argentine state oil firm will invest around $400 million as part of a new joint venture to produce and sell sustainable aviation fuel (SAF). The new venture, to be called Santa Fe Bio, will be run in tandem with Essential Energy and operate out of YPF's San Lorenzo refinery. The project, which will pull financing from Argentina's Large Investment Incentive Regime, is planned in two phases, YPF said in a statement.
author: Analysts Account
